markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Finalize the user invitation flow and define initial user roles.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**User Invitations:** To prevent security risks (e.g., invite forwarding) and simplify launch scope, invitations will be tied to the specific email address used for the invite.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
  - [**User Roles:** All invited users will launch as "Members" with full content management permissions (prompts, context) and the ability to invite others. This maximizes early engagement and avoids friction.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
  - [**Analytics Stack:** Rudderstack will be the primary data pipeline, replacing Segment. This choice mitigates risk from Twilio's lack of innovation and offers future self-hosting flexibility.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
  - [**HubSpot Strategy:** CheckThat will use a separate HubSpot instance to prevent data contamination between its PLG model and GrowthX's enterprise sales data.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)

## Topics

### User Invitation Flow

  - [**Problem:** Decide if users must accept invites with the exact email or can choose a different one.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [**Rationale for Tying to Invite Email:**](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
      - [**Security:** Prevents invite forwarding to unauthorized users.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=501.0)
      - [**Admin Clarity:** Ensures admins see the expected user email (e.g., `user@company.com`), avoiding confusion or data breach concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
      - [**Simplicity:** Matches the standard, secure flow of tools like Figma.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
  - [**Rationale Against Tying to Invite Email:**](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [**Flexibility:** Allows users to consolidate accounts, which is common for agencies or users tracking competitors in separate workspaces.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [**User Experience:** Prevents login conflicts if a user is already logged in with a different email.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=713.0)
  - [**Decision:** Tie invites to the specific email address. This is the simplest, most secure path for launch. An account picker can be added as a fast follow.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)

### User Roles & Permissions

  - [**Problem:** Define user roles for launch, balancing security with the need for early engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
  - [**Initial Proposal:**](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1057.0)
      - [**Workspace Owner:** Manages billing and invites.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
      - [**Workspace Member:** Manages content (prompts, context) but cannot invite users or touch billing.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [**Revised Decision for Launch:**](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
      - [**Role:** "Member" (no "Owner" role at launch).](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
      - [**Permissions:** Full content management, ability to invite other users.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
      - [**Restrictions:** Cannot manage billing or delete the workspace.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1446.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This approach maximizes early engagement by removing friction from the invitation process. It avoids the risk of users needing to contact support just to invite a colleague.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1483.0)
  - [**Future State:** A more granular "Admin" role can be introduced later, potentially downgrading current "Members" to a more restricted role.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)

### Analytics & Marketing Tech Stack

  - [**Problem:** Establish the analytics and marketing stack for launch.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [**Data Pipeline:**](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
      - [**Tool:** Rudderstack.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A direct, open-source replacement for Segment that mitigates risk from Twilio's perceived lack of innovation and offers future self-hosting flexibility.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
  - [**Marketing & Support Tools:**](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
      - [**Tools:** Intercom, Customer.io, Google Tag Manager.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
      - [**Implementation:** Daniel will install all tools via Rogers Tech this week.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [**HubSpot Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
      - [**Decision:** Create a separate HubSpot instance for CheckThat.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Prevents data contamination between CheckThat's PLG model and GrowthX's enterprise sales data.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1862.0)
      - [**Action:** Jason will prioritize this setup, potentially with help from Jeff Ignacio or Leah.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Pedro:** Update the user invitation ticket to reflect the decision to tie invites to the specific email address.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [**Pedro:** Update the user roles ticket to reflect the "Member" role's permissions (full content management, ability to invite others).](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1303.0)
  - [**Daniel:** Complete the output migration and workflow setup (target downtime: Jan 27, 6 p.m.).](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [**Daniel:** Install the full marketing/support tech stack (Rudderstack, Intercom, Customer.io, GTM).](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
  - [**Jason:** Prioritize setting up the separate HubSpot instance for CheckThat.](https://fathom.video/share/yLNUw-n2b94JbiPaa1W8YGrz7cQewyD1?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)
